summary: Removed the remaining compatibility-style generator contract for admin-osok#3 by replacing existingKinds with normal per-resource sdkName mappings, generalizing preserve-existing-spec-surface for checked-in artifacts, and updating the checked-in docs/tests to reject parity or compatibility inputs.
next_focus: Proceed to review and verify that the checked-in generator contract no longer exposes parity or compatibility settings while preserving the documented checked-in artifact flow.
